title: 7Sea Invitational
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:7Sea Invitational}} {{Skyesports Navbox}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name= 7Sea Invitational |tickername= 7Sea Invitational |shortname=7Sea Invitational |image=7sea Invitational Logo.png |icon= |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=7Sea Invitational |organizer=7Sea Esports|organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/7seaesportsofficial/ |organizer2=Skyesports |organizer2-link=http://www.skyesports.in/ |sponsor=[https://www.gillette.co.in/en-in Gillette] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd=20000 |perspective=tpp |country=India |venue= |sdate=2022-03-30 |edate=2022-04-03 |web=http://www.skyesports.in/ |facebook=skyesportindia |discord= |youtube=skyesportsindia |youtube2=7SeaEsportsofficial |instagram=skyesportsgaming |instagram2=7seaesportsofficial |previous= |next= }} ==About== '''7Sea Invitational''' is sponsored by [https://www.gillette.co.in/en-in Gillette India] and organised by [https://7seaesports.com/ 7Sea Esports] in collaboration with [http://www.skyesports.in/ Skyesports]. In the battlegrounds, the top 24 teams will compete for a total prize money of 20,000 {{Abbr/USD}}. ===Broadcast Talent=== {{Tabs dynamic|name1=Hindi Broadcast|name2=English Broadcast|name3=Tamil Broadcast|name4=Telugu Broadcast|name5=Kannada Broadcast|name6=Bengali Broadcast|This=1}} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|1}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |b1= RA1|b1name=|b1flag=in |b2=Gamezo Tech|b2name=Subodh Panwar|b2flag=in |b3=Captain Price|b3name=Dhrubajyoti Das|b3flag=in |b4=Divine|b4name=Prince Kumar|b4flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|2}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |b1=Edge|b1flag=in|b1name=Anish Raj |b2=Darshita|b2flag=in |b3=LUCIF3R|b3flag=in|b3name=Sanat Kumar }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|3}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Tamil Commentator |b1=FedUpGlady|b1name=Gladson Anto|b1flag=in |b2=Randy|b2name=Vishnu Priyan|b2flag=in |b3=Phoenix Prabha YT|b3name=S.Prabhakran|b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|4}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Telugu Commentator |b1=FearLess Ninja|b1name=Samudrla Prem Sai Rishyanth|b1flag=in |b2=CLAW GAMING|b2name=Bonthu Govind|b2flag=in |b3=Telgu Gamer|b3name=K.Seetan Chowdary|b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|5}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Kannada Commentator |b1=Spectra Gaming|b1name=Akash T|b1flag=in |b2=Frost|b2name=Bharath Gowda N|b2flag=in |b3=Jay|b3name=Jayanth MV|b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|6}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Bengali Commentator |b1=TTRXD|b1name=Tanmoy Roy|b1flag=in |b2=Rohan Playzz|b2name=Rohan Das|b2flag=in |b3=10 Jeet Gaming|b3name=Jeet Sardar|b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/end}} ===Format=== * '''''Semi Finals:''' March 25th - March 29th, 2022 ** '''Squads {{Abbr/TPP}}''' persepective. ** '' A total of 24 invited teams will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 24 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days, ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Finals.'' * '''''Finals:''' 30th March 2022 to 3rd April 2022'' ** '' A total of 16 Qualified teams will play in the Finals'' ** ''30 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days ====Matchdays==== * ''5 Matchdays: 6 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>M>>S>>E'' ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
